title: SRUM (System Resource Usage Monitor)
overview: SRUM (System Resource Usage Monitor) is a built-in Windows feature that tracks detailed system activity including application usage, network traffic, and user interaction. It stores up to 30–60 days of historical data and is valuable in both DFIR and behavior analysis.
